name: Ahmad Sheraz
tagline: AI/ML Engineer  |  Backend Developer  |  BS Computer Science
summary: Computer Science student at COMSATS University Islamabad, Lahore Campus with hands-on experience building AI-driven applications, machine learning pipelines, and full-stack backend systems. Completed a web development internship at WEBBUGGS, gaining professional experience in frontend development and database management. Proficient in Python, FastAPI, OpenCV, and Scikit-Learn with practical implementation across computer vision, emotion detection, and predictive analytics. Currently contributing to LUMINA, a university research project on emotionally intelligent human-AI interaction. Seeking an industry internship aligned with AI/ML, backend development, or intelligent systems engineering.

experience.title: Web Developer Intern
bullets: Developed and styled responsive web pages using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Managed and queried application data using MongoDB for dynamic web functionality
Built and maintained client-facing WordPress websites with custom configurations and content updates

projects.name: LUMINA — Emotionally Intelligent Virtual Assistant
projects.stack: Python, FastAPI, OpenAI Whisper, SpeechBrain, MongoDB, ONNX Runtime, Hugging Face Transformers, AWS, WebGL
bullets: Built the multimodal emotion input pipeline integrating OpenAI Whisper, SpeechBrain, and facial expression analysis into a unified real-time streaming architecture
Developed FastAPI backend endpoints for emotion analysis consumed by the frontend and avatar rendering layers
Engineered a dynamic Voice Activity Detector (VAD) achieving sub-second emotion aggregation
Supervised by Dr. Usama Ijaz Bajwa, Associate Professor, COMSATS University Islamabad

projects.name: Intelligent Emotion Detection System
projects.stack: Python, FastAPI, MongoDB, OpenAI Whisper, NLP, HTML/CSS/JS
bullets: Built a full-stack emotion analysis platform with FastAPI backend and Vanilla JS frontend supporting text and audio emotion detection with score breakdowns
Orchestrated a live multimodal streaming pipeline fusing speech transcription, speech emotion recognition, and NLP-based emotion classification
Implemented interactive emotion timeline dashboards and adaptive response generation based on detected user emotion history

projects.name: AI Face Recognition Attendance System
bullets: Developed a real-time biometric attendance system using OpenCV's LBPH algorithm with custom dataset training and configurable recognition distance thresholds
Engineered a modular pipeline covering face detection (Haar Cascade), recognition, identity validation, and automated attendance logging
Integrated MySQL backend to manage student profiles and securely track attendance records autonomously

projects.name: Income Predictor — ML Pipeline
projects.stack: Python, Scikit-Learn, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Jupyter Notebook
bullets: Built an end-to-end classification pipeline on the Adult Income Dataset (48K+ records, 14 features) to predict individual income bracket
Performed comprehensive EDA, domain-based feature engineering, and PCA dimensionality reduction
Trained and evaluated multiple classification models comparing Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1-Score

projects.name: E-Commerce Backend Platform
projects.stack: Node.js, Express.js, Tailwind CSS, EJS, Git
bullets: Architected a secure MVC-patterned backend with bcrypt-hashed role-based access control and a dedicated admin inventory portal
Engineered a custom JSON database engine mirroring the Sequelize ORM API for lightweight persistent storage
Implemented full shopping cart persistence, product filtering, and structured deployment-ready repository guidelines
Delivered structured C++ programming sessions to university students covering fundamentals through object-oriented programming

extracurriculars.organization: ACM COMSATS Lahore Student Chapter — Capture Crew
bullets: Covered on-campus tech events and produced highlight reels, strengthening the ACM community's media presence

extracurriculars.organization: ACM COMSATS Lahore Student Chapter — 404 Squad
bullets: Organized competitive programming events for university students, fostering a problem-solving culture on campus
